message:
fix(engine): replace unchecked .sum() with saturating arithmetic across six modules

Numeric aggregations using Iterator::sum() can panic on overflow in debug
builds and silently wrap in release builds. Neither behavior is correct
for counters and accumulators that grow monotonically with workload.

Replace all affected call sites with .fold(0, saturating_add) which caps
at the type maximum instead of panicking or wrapping:

- array_fast_lane: total_accesses, total_stores (u64)
- catastrophe_witness_generator: total_boundary_sharpness_millionths in
  both build_brittleness_report and franken_engine_catastrophe_manifest (u64)
- gc_pause: PauseTracker::total_bytes_reclaimed (u64)
- global_coherence_checker: total_severity (i64, uses closure form)
- specialization_perf_release_gate: StatisticalSummary wall_time and
  memory delta sums (i64, uses closure form)
- trace_fusion: total_savings (i64), total_executions, total_exits (u64)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
